author: codex-agent

patch.value: Implements unresolved external report #4 plus strict governance option from report #1 improvements.
Strict skipped-test policy and linked-test assertion semantics
Introduce additive fail-on-skipped policy and assertion metadata for linked tests so successful exit codes alone are not the only verification signal.
pm test and pm test-all support fail-on-skipped policy; linked tests can define assertions (text/regex/json-threshold style) that fail deterministically when unmet.
Linked command exits 0 with logically bad output or skipped entries and still reports pass today.
Verification can enforce assertion intent and optionally fail on skipped coverage.
Exit-code-only semantics can overstate linked-test evidence quality.
Improves confidence in governance automation and release-readiness evidence.

value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm-4g5i classifies failures but does not add fail-on-skipped policy or user-defined assertion evaluation semantics.
